# AI-Tadpole-OS

> A local-first, sovereign multi-agent runtime designed for high-performance orchestration, private memory, and human-in-the-loop governance.

AI-Tadpole-OS (Tadpole OS) separates directives, orchestration, and execution into a robust, three-layer architecture to solve the probabilistic reliability issue of LLM applications.

## Primary Documentation Links
- [Core Runtime Github](https://github.com/DDS-Solutions/AI-TadPole-OS)
- [How It Works](https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/how-it-works/)
- [Mission & Sovereign Vision](https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/mission/)
- [Governance Protocol](https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/governance/)

## Key Technical Specifications
- **Core Runtime**: Written in high-performance Rust for deterministic thread/process isolation.
- **Agent Orchestration**: Swarm coordination at 10Hz frequency heartbeat.
- **Agent Intelligence**: Self-annealing, self-debugging loop designed for runtime stability.
- **Private Memory & RAG**: LanceDB vector database and SQLite indexing mapping the Open Knowledge Foundation (OKF) specification for structured institutional knowledge.
- **Templates Ecosystem**: Visual Swarm Architect tool and 46+ specialized pre-configured swarms across 23+ industries.
- **Safety & Security**: Sapphire Shield zero-trust capability gates requiring human Overlord approval, strict local-first data sandboxing, and OBLITERATUS hard reset/Merkle trail verification.

## Marketing Site Sitemap
- **Homepage** (`https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/`): High-level overview of runtime features, telemetry, templates ecosystem, visual Swarm Architect, and OS characteristics.
- **How It Works** (`https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/how-it-works/`): Details on the three-layer architecture (Directive, Orchestration, Execution), Knowledge Vault (OKF & LanceDB), BFS pathfinding, and memory integration.
- **Mission** (`https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/mission/`): Focus on sovereign intelligence, privacy-preserving local swarms, and independence from monopolistic API dependencies.
- **Governance** (`https://dds-solutions.github.io/AI-Tadpole-OS-Marketing/governance/`): Explanations of safety systems, consensus algorithms, and telemetry constraints.
